description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Pull Request Checks that runs on pull requests to the master and feature branches. Use an ubuntu-latest job that checks out the repository, sets up .NET Core 3.1 and .NET 5, and Node.js 10.x. Then, verify building by installing npm dependencies, copying files, building with dotnet, and publishing. Next, run tests with code coverage and upload the coverage report to Codecov.
